it has been a football phenomenon, the coming together of arguably the greatest attacking line-up in history. We managed a record 114 goals between them in 2014 and 2015. In the summer of 2014, Barcelona signed Luis Suárez from Liverpool amidst a storm of international controversy. In 2014, at the World Cup in Brazil, he was sent off for attacking an opponent. Luis Suárez is banned from taking part in any kind of football-related activity, administrative, sport or any other, for a period of four months in accordance with article 22 of the FIFA Disciplinary Code. Banned from all football activity for four months due to a high-profile World Cup misdemeanor, Suarez was, at 81 million euros, both a footballing and ethical gamble for the club. But Barca had a dream to unite the greatest attacking force on the planet, combining Suarez with existing stars Lionel Messi and Neymar. Messi, Suarez, Neymar spells danger, spells goal.
